name: RiboDiffusion
description: Design RNA sequences from fixed 3D RNA backbones (tertiary inverse folding). Uses diffusion-based ancestral denoising conditioned on RNA tertiary structure. Conditional scaling weight controls the recovery-diversity trade-off reported in the paper.
capabilities: Design RNA sequences from fixed 3D RNA backbones (tertiary inverse folding)
Uses diffusion-based ancestral denoising conditioned on RNA tertiary structure
Conditional scaling weight controls the recovery-diversity trade-off reported in the paper

pdbFile.description: Fixed 3D RNA backbone structure in PDB format for tertiary inverse folding

conditionalScaling.description: Conditional scaling weight controlling the recovery-diversity trade-off

numSequences.description: Number of RNA sequences to generate
